query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime city street view with illuminated high-rise buildings and leafless deciduous trees lining the road. Horizontal streaks of red, white, and amber light cross the wide asphalt street, which features double yellow dividing lines. A weathered metal utility pole rises from a concrete base wrapped with chain on the left sidewalk, next to a metal grate. Street lamps and traffic signals produce bright starburst patterns, and the glass facades of skyscrapers reflect interior lights against the dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime city street view showing intentional motion blur from long exposure, with vehicle lights rendered as horizontal streaks of red, white, and amber across the wide asphalt street. A sickly orange sodium vapor cast dominates the roadway and left sidewalk, contrasting with the cooler white and blue illumination from building windows and street lamps. Leafless deciduous trees and illuminated high-rise buildings line the street. A weathered metal utility pole rises from a concrete base wrapped with chain on the left sidewalk, next to a metal grate. Street lamps produce sharp starburst patterns against the dark sky.
